About.label: Our story
About.title: We believe productivity should be simple.
About.p1: Nebbuler was born out of frustration with overly complex productivity tools. We spent years testing every app, every method, every framework — and kept coming back to one conclusion: the best system is the one you actually use.
About.p2: Our templates are built around Notion because it gives you ultimate flexibility without the complexity. Each template is carefully crafted to feel minimal, intuitive, and immediately useful. No 200-page manuals. No endless setup. Just open, duplicate, and go.
About.p3: We're a small team of designers and productivity enthusiasts based across Latin America and Europe. Every template ships with the same question in mind: would we use this ourselves every single day?
About.value1Desc: Every design decision starts with removing things, not adding them. If a feature doesn't serve the user immediately, it doesn't ship.
About.value2Desc: We don't build templates for screenshots. We build them for real workflows. Every structure is tested against actual daily use.
About.value3Desc: All paid templates receive free updates forever. When Notion ships new features, we improve our templates to match.
